problem id: c625ba91
category: bit_manipulation

rule: I XOR NOT

examples:
  11010011 -> 11111111
  11010111 -> 11111111
  01110101 -> 11111111
  00000000 -> 11111111
  11110110 -> 11111111
  00001000 -> 11111111
  10010001 -> 11111111
  11010000 -> 11111111
  01110100 -> 11111111
  11100111 -> 11111111

query: 10100000
predicted answer: 11111111
